span.p: Capacity throttling / rejection observed in Metrics app

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is this a one-off spike
or sustained over a long window?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
WAIT / verify over a long window
short stress tests are hidden by smoothing

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Is interactive BI being hurt
by heavy background jobs
on the SAME capacity?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Can you move the noisy workload
to another capacity now?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ISOLATE — move data-prep/pipelines/AI
to a separate capacity; tag BI Mission Critical

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ENABLE/TUNE SURGE PROTECTION
set background rejection + recovery thresholds

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OPTIMIZE — V-Order/NEE, stop idle Spark,
pre-aggregate, fix destructive loads, query folding

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: SCALE OUT — more capacities / move workspaces
